_meta.description: Reasoning scaffolds for identity domain analysis and extraction.

scaffolds.name: Primary ID Extraction
steps: Determine document type and side (front/back) from layout cues
Extract name, document number, issuer, issue/expiry dates
Extract date of birth, nationality, and jurisdiction fields
Map each extracted field to page/zone anchor
Mask sensitive identifiers in output
Mark unreadable/missing fields as unverified without inference

scaffolds.name: Passport MRZ and Visual Cross-Check
steps: Locate MRZ lines and parse passport key fields
Cross-check MRZ values against visual inspection zone fields
Validate issue and expiry timeline consistency
Flag mismatches and unclear characters
Record confidence notes for OCR-sensitive characters
Return strict citation for each verified field

scaffolds.name: Proof-of-Address Review
steps: Identify issuing institution and statement date
Extract full address line and recipient name
Check address completeness and recency criteria
Validate that the document type matches accepted proof classes
Mark missing lines or obscured values as unverified
Summarize pass/fail readiness with citations

scaffolds.name: Business Registration Certificate Review
steps: Extract legal entity name, registration number, and registry office
Extract incorporation date and status
Validate jurisdiction and company type fields
Cross-check references to annexes or registry extracts
Flag missing critical fields without inference
Provide document-grounded compliance summary
